---
format:
    revealjs:
        theme: simple
        css: compro-style.css
        slide-number: c/t
        include-after-body: hide-logo.html
        chalkboard:
            buttons: true
            theme: whiteboard
        transition: slide
        background-transition: fade
        code-copy: true
        code-fold: true
        code-overflow: wrap
        smaller: false
        incremental: false
        preview-links: auto
        logo: "logo.png"
        footer: ""
        margin: 0.1
        fig-responsive: true
        highlight-style: github
        html-math-method: katex
---

# {#hero-slide .gradient-hero .smaller .hide-logo}

<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: -10vh;">

![](logo.png){width=600 style="margin-bottom: 20px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center; max-height: 200px;"}

<h2 style="font-size: 1.8em; color: #2563eb; font-weight: 600; margin: 0;">Indonesia's Next AI-Native ERP</h2>


</div>
